title: melilotus sulcatus subsp. infestus
intro: Melilotus sulcatus subsp. infestus, also known as yellow melilot, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of yellow melilot include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Yellow melilot can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
